snps.effect_template: 8q24 region variant. A allele increases prostate cancer risk ~1.6x in European ancestry.
Rare HOXB13 variant with strong effect (OR 4.5).
MSMB (microseminoprotein beta) variant associated with prostate cancer risk (OR ~1.25).
KLK3 (kallikrein-3/PSA) protective variant reducing prostate cancer risk.
JAZF1 variant with protective effect on prostate cancer risk.
HNF1B (hepatocyte nuclear factor 1-beta) variant increasing prostate cancer susceptibility.
FOXP4 (forkhead box P4) variant modestly increasing prostate cancer risk.

recommendation_template: Consider discussing PSA screening schedule with your doctor. Earlier or more frequent screening may be appropriate given genetic risk profile.

studies.title: Multiple loci identified in GWAS of prostate cancer
studies.finding: rs1447295 A allele OR=1.62 for prostate cancer in European ancestry

studies.title: Multiple loci identified in a genome-wide association study of prostate cancer
studies.finding: Identified multiple prostate cancer susceptibility loci including MSMB, KLK3, JAZF1, HNF1B, and FOXP4 variants
